ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: C19 Dragoon precision coil barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A precision coil barrel tuned for the C19 Dragoon's medium-long range firing solution. Its longer acceleration path favors velocity and consistency over close-range handling.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: C19 Dragoon folding stock
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A compact folding stock for the C19 Dragoon. It keeps the rifle light and quick to present, but gives up some long-range stability compared with rigid marksman stocks.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 5.8x42 tungsten-alloy penetrators
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: 5.8x42 tungsten-alloy armor-piercing rods for the C19 Dragoon. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 30-round 5.8x42 magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Combat Extended C19 Dragoon magazine holding 30 rounds of 5.8x42 ammunition.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 30-round 5.8x42 flip magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Two opposed C19 Dragoon 30-round magazines bound together for a faster flip reload. It keeps standard loaded capacity but reduces reload time.
